body:
Bill, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy](orgs/breakthrough-energy) summit last week — your panel on grid-scale storage was genuinely one of the more grounded conversations I've heard on the topic in a while. I've been thinking more about what you said regarding the valuation compression we're seeing at Series A in climate infrastructure, and I think you're right that it's creating some genuinely interesting entry points for patient capital. We're currently doing deeper diligence on two companies in that space and I'd love to get your read on the market dynamics before we move to term sheets. Would you have 30 minutes sometime the week of the 29th for a quick call? As always, your perspective means a lot to me and I don't take lightly that you make time for these conversations.

Amara
